meaning: n.palatine的职位,领地,巴列丁奈特之居民
examples: It is surrounded by fields, rape, or wheat, or vines in the Palatinate, lavender in Provence.
In Rhineland-Palatinate the SPD's share of the vote plunged from 46% to 36%.
The results in wine-producing Rhineland-Palatinate were interesting but unremarkable.
In Rhineland-Palatinate, the SPD's Kurt Beck is the only premier to govern without a coalition partner.
Mr Beck, a popular premier in Rhineland-Palatinate, has been unable to extend his appeal farther north.
